commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the OpenRouter stream wrapper to add explicit bearer and OpenRouter attribution headers from the resolved runtime API key, with focused OpenRouter and OpenAI-compatible auth tests.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +96. Total +135 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. with medium confidence from source and report evidence: the linked regression describes a concrete v2026.6.10 OpenRouter API-key 401 path, and the PR body includes live after-fix OpenRouter probe output. I did not run a live before-fix OpenRouter request in this read-only review.
